title: Walking skeleton: kb serve + /api/tree + sidebar
description:
Add a `serve` subcommand to skills/repo-wiki/scripts/kb.py that boots a stdlib ThreadingHTTPServer on localhost (default --port 8347), serving:
- a static HTML shell (assets/web/index.html) + vendored client assets (app.js, style.css) and a vendored marked.min.js (pin version, add PROVENANCE note),
- GET /api/tree -> JSON of the wiki folder/page structure (dirs + pages with relative path + Compiled-Truth first line), reusing load_pages/compiled_truth_first_line and the outline logic.
Client renders a sidebar tree of folders/pages with links. This establishes the API + asset pipeline = the shared contract for later ticks.

Stack rules per .tick/config.md: stdlib only, localhost bind, assets vendored (no CDN).

Test:
- python3 -m py_compile skills/repo-wiki/scripts/kb.py
- boot server; curl http://localhost:8347/api/tree returns 200 + JSON listing seeded pages
- GET / returns the HTML shell that loads app.js/style.css
notes:
2026-06-14 09:52 - When building the shell + initial style.css, follow the Clean-docs design spec (see epic note): tokens + system fonts + light/dark + sidebar/content layout.
2026-06-14 09:53 - Refinement: 'minimal/neutral but crafted' — use the authoritative DESIGN TOKENS note on the epic verbatim for the initial style.css; restraint over chrome.
acceptance_criteria: kb serve boots on localhost; /api/tree returns JSON of folders+pages; / serves the shell; py_compile passes
closed_reason: Completed: kb serve (stdlib, 127.0.0.1) + /api/tree + sidebar tree + vendored marked v12 + Clean-docs style.css. Static via allowlist; /api/tree contract set.
